verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So many people in this life Are filled with pain and strife, Wondering just what the future holds for them; But, there's no doubt in this mind, In my brand new home I'll find.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: It may be in the sacred choir, Praising God is my desire, I'll worship Him forever and a day; And how I'll know I'm in that place Is by the smile on His face, When he holds me in His lovin' arm of grace.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Bridge: Goin' home, I'm goin' home There's nothin' to hold me here; I've caught a glimpse of that heavenly home, This is my place. I'm goin' home.
